ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Last edit location is not active for this file (folder not included).
ast.target: 该文件的最后编辑位置未激活（不包含文件夹）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No last edit location found for this file.
ast.target: 未找到该文件的最后编辑位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the source for the unique note identifier.
ast.target: 选择唯一笔记标识符的来源。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Give a field name in which's value the plugin will add the generated UUID (version 1 of RFC 9562, https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9562.html#name-uuid-version-1). • Required when 'Source' is set to 'Option A'.
ast.target: 提供一个字段名，插件将把生成的 UUID（RFC 9562 版本 1，https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9562.html#name-uuid-version-1）写入该字段的值中。• 当“Source”设置为“Option A”时必填。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose an existing field name from the front matter to use as an unique ID for the note (e.g., 'created', 'title'). • The plugin will not generate any field name or value. If the field is not found, the cursor position will not be saved. • Required when 'Source' is set to 'Option B'.
ast.target: 从 front matter 中选择一个已有字段名作为笔记的唯一 ID（例如 'created'、'title'）。• 插件不会生成任何字段名或值。若未找到该字段，将不会保存光标位置。• 当“Source”设置为“Option B”时必填。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The plugin will use the note's relative path in the vault (e.g., 'folder/note.md') as the unique identifier. This is for those who does not use the front matter.
ast.target: 插件将使用笔记在仓库中的相对路径（例如 'folder/note.md'）作为唯一标识符。适用于不使用 front matter 的用户。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds before restoring the cursor position. Increase this if the cursor does not restore consistently.
ast.target: 恢复光标位置前的延迟（毫秒）。如果光标无法稳定恢复，请增大该值。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scroll cursor line to center of view
ast.target: 将光标所在行滚动到视图中心

ast.name: name
ast.source: Option A. ID name for plugin generated UUID
ast.target: 选项 A。插件生成的 UUID 的 ID 名称

ast.name: name
ast.source: Option B. ID name for user provided field
ast.target: 选项 B。用户提供字段的 ID 名称

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., uuid or uid or id
ast.target: 例如，uuid 或 uid 或 id
